channel.title: Api-Testing on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Api-Testing on Pi Stack

item.title: Best Self-Hosted API Mocking Tools: WireMock vs Mockoon vs MockServer 2026
item.description: When you are building a frontend that depends on a backend that does not exist yet, or testing a microservice that needs responses from three other services, you run into a classic problem: how do you keep working when your dependencies are not ready? API mocking is the answer. By running a local server that pretends to be the real API, you can develop, test, and iterate without waiting on anyone else.
